text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It's almost time for curfew, but the lights in the
gym are still on, so I go to investigate what's
going on.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
All right. Done with the barbell. Next up is fifty
leg presses.
choice_data_list: Hey, curfew's coming up pretty soon.
Hey, curfew's coming up pretty soon.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: So? I'm in the zone here, so don't bother me.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: So? I'm in the zone here, so don't bother me.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Shut up. Like I need telling.

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Heeeey! Taishiiiin!

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
Ugh. Another member to add to the rabble. Just
what I need.

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
We didn't get to play the funny-face version of
rock, paper, scissors at lunch, so let's hurry back
and play it now!

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
Will you stop with that?! I'm not gonna play it, no
matter how much you run after me and pester me
about it!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
Ooh! If you want me to run after you, that must
mean you wanna play tag instead! Okay, get
ready, 'cause I'm gonna catch ya!

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: What?! That's not what I even—

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Ready, set, GOOOO!

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Oh, come on!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Narita Taishin dashes off with terrifying ferocity,
leaving Winning Ticket in her dust.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
Who do you think I am? I know how to watch my
limits just fine!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Suddenly, I notice an open notebook under
Narita Taishin's training equipment. It's filled with
meticulously planned exercises.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
Hey! Who told you you could look at my
notebook?

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
Hmph. It's just what I have to do to make sure I
win.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
I have to work hard to make up for all the talents
and attributes I wasn't blessed with.

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Waaaah! That's so moviiing!

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
Ugh, not you again, Ticket! Why are you always
bursting into tears?! It's so annoying!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: I came—hic!—to get you, but after hearing your story... Waaah! You're so amazing, Taishiiiin!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
You're so cool, but I'm worried you're pushing
yourself too hard! Don't overdo iiiit!

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
Yeah, yeah, okay. I got it. There's no way I can
focus like this.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Look, I'll go back now, so stop crying!
